Home › Exercises › Calisthenics / Bodyweight › Chinup

Chinup

🏋️ Calisthenics / Bodyweight · Pull

Also known as: chinups, chin up, chin ups, chin-up

Log it by text

Reps
/chinups 10
Sets × Reps
/chinups 3x10
also valid: /log chinups 3x10
Sets × Reps @ Weight
/chinups 3x10@45
also valid: /log chinups 3x10@45

Underscores, dashes, and spaces are interchangeable — every spelling above logs the same exercise.
